title: Best House | Lemon Squeezer | Manual Lemon Citrus Juicer | 300 ml | BLUE | Multifunctional Glass Fruit Juicer | Lemon Lime Orange Citrus Squeezer Manual Hand Press Juice (Pack of 1)
features: Hight Quality Material: Hand Press Juice Will Last A Long Time Made From High Quality Glass And Plastic Lemon Squeezer is Designed With Durability in Mind Glass Of Freshly Squeezed Juice .

Hand Press /Citrus Juicer manual is a transparent juice glass jug with a plastic lid and generous capacity. It lets you see how much juice you have and pours an easily removable lid for easy to cleaning.

These citrus hand press juicer is very easy to clean, just wash with water and storage it in kitchen small space, you can take along this hand orange juicer when you are in camping adventure or on a trip
Make quick work of juicing your favorited citrus fruits with this citrus squeezer attractive fruit juicer special for orange, lemon and grapefruit
NON-SLIP BOTTOM, DISHWASHER SAFE : The non-slip silicone ring at the bottom keeps the bowl in place. Perfectly safe to put the entire kit in the dishwasher when you are finished.

GRATER FOR FRUIT , VEGETABLES, CHEESE, CHOCOLATE: The grater can be used for a wide variety of ingredients, such as cheese, apples, melons, bananas, carrots, potatoes, beets, ginger, chocolate, ice cubes and much more.
EASY TO USE : Just cut your lemon in half, lay the meat face down and press, through the juice hole in the bottom of the juicer, Carefully guide the juice towards the bowl or cup.
